languages.text: Какие-то ящики Инквизиции с некронским барахлом внутри

traits.locale_text: Какие-то ящики Инквизиции с некронским барахлом внутри

languages.text: На крышке ящика красуется грозная литера "I". Толстые стенки и гермозатворы свидетельствуют об одном — что бы ни хранили в себе эти контейнеры, оно не должно было выйти наружу.
An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.
languages.original_text: На крышке ящика красуется грозная литера "I". Толстые стенки и гермозатворы свидетельствуют об одном — что бы ни хранили в себе эти контейнеры, оно не должно было выйти наружу.

traits.locale_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its heavy walls and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.
An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its heavy walls and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.
An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.
An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

languages.text: Auf dem Deckel der Truhe prangt ein unheilvolles "I". Ihre robusten Wände und hermetischen Siegel sprechen für sich: Was auch immer darin eingeschlossen wurde, sollte nie befreit werden.
languages.original_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

traits.locale_text: Auf dem Deckel der Truhe prangt ein unheilvolles "I". Ihre robusten Wände und hermetischen Siegel sprechen für sich: Was auch immer darin eingeschlossen wurde, sollte nie befreit werden.

languages.text: Un "I" inquiétant est apposé sur le couvercle de la caisse. À en juger par ses parois épaisses et ses sceaux hermétiques, ce contenant était destiné à ne plus jamais être ouvert.
languages.original_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

traits.locale_text: Un "I" inquiétant est apposé sur le couvercle de la caisse. À en juger par ses parois épaisses et ses sceaux hermétiques, ce contenant était destiné à ne plus jamais être ouvert.

languages.text: Una inquietante «I» marca la tapa de la caja. Su anchura y sus sellos herméticos hablan por sí solos: lo que había encerrado en su interior no debía liberarse.
languages.original_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

traits.locale_text: Una inquietante «I» marca la tapa de la caja. Su anchura y sus sellos herméticos hablan por sí solos: lo que había encerrado en su interior no debía liberarse.

languages.text: Sandığın kapağına uğursuz bir "I" harfi kazınmış. Kalın kenarları ve hermetik mühürleri, içine koyulan her ne idiyse asla serbest bırakılmaması gerektiğini ifade ediyor.
languages.original_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

traits.locale_text: Sandığın kapağına uğursuz bir "I" harfi kazınmış. Kalın kenarları ve hermetik mühürleri, içine koyulan her ne idiyse asla serbest bırakılmaması gerektiğini ifade ediyor.

languages.text: 箱盖上印着一个不祥的“I”。它厚实的箱壁与密封结构已说明了一切：封存其中的东西，永远都不能被释放出来。
languages.original_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

traits.locale_text: 箱盖上印着一个不祥的“I”。它厚实的箱壁与密封结构已说明了一切：封存其中的东西，永远都不能被释放出来。

languages.text: 箱の蓋には、不吉な「I」が描かれている。厚い側面と密閉された蓋は、その中に封じられたものは決して解放される運命ではないことを物語っている。
languages.original_text: An ominous "I" is emblazoned on the crate's lid. Its thick sides and hermetic seals speak for themselves: whatever was sealed within was never meant to be released.

traits.locale_text: 箱の蓋には、不吉な「I」が描かれている。厚い側面と密閉された蓋は、その中に封じられたものは決して解放される運命ではないことを物語っている。
